summary: Dispatch Lots V2 and Price Master feature testing completed. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified and working correctly. Fixed 2 bugs during testing.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility improvement needed

action_items: MINOR: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent in DispatchLots.js for accessibility compliance
critical_code_review_comments: All 16 backend API tests passed - Price Master and Dispatch Lots V2 endpoints working correctly
Price Master template endpoint returns correct columns and example
Dispatch Lots V2 summary returns correct status counts
Dispatch Lots V2 create lot with customer + SKU + qty working
Dispatch Lots V2 send-to-finance changes status to PENDING_FINANCE
Dispatch Lots V2 inventory-check returns availability data
Buyer SKU update with HSN/GST fields working correctly
Frontend Dispatch Lots page loads with summary cards (Total, Draft, Pending Finance, Invoiced, Dispatched)
Create Lot dialog has Customer dropdown, SKU dropdown, Quantity input, Notes field
Status filter dropdown works correctly (All Statuses, Draft, Pending Finance, Invoiced, Dispatched)
Customer filter dropdown populated with buyers
Lots table shows lot number, customer, items count, total qty, status, created date, actions

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId not JSON serializable when creating price entry
bugs_fixed.fix: Added price_entry.pop('_id', None) before returning response

bugs_fixed.issue: fetchBuyerSkus requesting page_size=1000 but backend only allows max 100
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed page_size to 100 and updated response parsing to handle both 'items' and 'buyer_skus' keys

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements verified, Create Lot dialog working, Status filter working)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test lots created during testing with notes containing TEST_* prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dispatch Lots V2 two-stage workflow tested. Key verifications: 1) Price Master API - template, create, list, filter all working. 2) Dispatch Lots V2 API - summary, create, list, send-to-finance, inventory-check all working. 3) Buyer SKU HSN/GST update working. 4) Frontend page loads with 5 summary cards. 5) Create Lot dialog has Customer, SKU, Qty fields. 6) Status filter dropdown works. 7) Lots table shows all data correctly. Collections used: dispatch_lots_v2, price_master, buyers, buyer_skus, branch_inventory.

backend_api.GET /api/price-master: PASS - Returns prices list with pagination
backend_api.POST /api/price-master: PASS - Creates price entry (fixed ObjectId bug)
backend_api.GET /api/dispatch-lots-v2: PASS - Returns lots list with pagination
